suite.name: Tc18
suite.source: C:\SE_Sprint3final\Test\TS006_Payment Confirmation and Display of Payment Evidence\TC18\tc18.robot

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Does Not Contain Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` disappears from the current page.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: คำขอจองเส้นทางของฉัน
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//button[contains(.,'ยืนยันแล้ว')]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(.,'ยืนยันแล้ว')]
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(.,'ยกเลิกการจอง')]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//button[contains(.,'ยกเลิกการจอง')]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(.,'ยกเลิกการจอง')]
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: ระบุเหตุผลการยกเลิก
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'xpath=//select' by value COMMUNICATION_ISSUE.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'สลิปไม่ถูกต้อง' into text field 'xpath=//textarea'.
kw.arg: สลิปไม่ถูกต้อง
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//button[contains(.,'ดำเนินการต่อ')]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(.,'ดำเนินการต่อ')]
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: ยืนยันยกเลิกการจอง
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//button[contains(.,'ยืนยันยกเลิก')]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(.,'ยืนยันยกเลิก')]
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: เหตุผลการยกเลิกการจอง
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'ยกเลิกการจอง'.
kw.arg: ยกเลิกการจอง
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
